name: KyronMed Physician Group

locations.name: KyronMed Main Campus
locations.address: 1200 Medical Center Drive, Suite 300, Wilmington, DE 19801
locations.parking: Free parking available in the attached garage. Enter from Medical Center Drive.
locations.transit: Bus routes 2 and 15 stop at Medical Center Drive.

locations.name: KyronMed Newark Office
locations.parking: Free parking lot behind the building.
locations.transit: Near UD STAR Campus. Bus route 6.

whatToBring: Any relevant medical records or referral letters
newPatientInfo.referralRequired: Referrals are required for specialist visits if your insurance plan mandates one. Dr. Chen (Family Medicine) and Dr. Thompson (Pediatrics) do not require referrals.
newPatientInfo.arriveEarly: Please arrive 15 minutes before your scheduled appointment to complete paperwork.
newPatientInfo.cancellationPolicy: We ask for at least 24 hours notice for cancellations or reschedules. Late cancellations may be subject to a $25 fee.

prescriptionRefills.turnaround: Refill requests are typically processed within 24-48 business hours.
prescriptionRefills.process: Your provider will review the request and send it directly to your pharmacy.
prescriptionRefills.controlled: Controlled substance refills require an in-person or telehealth visit with your provider.

afterHoursInfo: For after-hours urgent concerns, call our main line at (302) 555-8700 and follow the prompts for the on-call provider. For emergencies, call 911.
